professional_identity.name: Dr. Ahmad Hidayat, MBA
professional_identity.organization: AMANA (Advisory and Resource Mobilization for Public Goods)
professional_identity.organization_description: High-integrity, high-impact, institution-grade advisory and resource mobilization firm in public goods and public service delivery improvement
professional_identity.tagline: Bridging health sector strategy, ASEAN partnerships, and public goods innovation through advisory leadership and thought leadership

primary_affiliations.scope: Strategic insight on health sector, independent judgment, ethical stewardship, idea sounding board
National health information exchange governance and implementation
Digital health innovation evaluation and policy recommendations

sub_specializations: Governance frameworks for public goods delivery
primary_advisory_domains.relevance_to_amana: Supports AMANA's health sector advisory and resource mobilization
Enables bridge to high-level ASEAN health sector partners
Supports coaching of AMANA leaders and staff
Contributes to AMANA's thought leadership and positioning

strategic_thinking_and_policy_insight.description: Provide strategic thinking and policy-level insight for health sector
strategic_thinking_and_policy_insight.scope: AMANA's health sector projects and initiatives
deliverables: Strategic advisory on health sector positioning

asean_partnership_bridging.description: Serve as bridge to high-level strategic partners in ASEAN health sector
deliverables: Introduction to ASEAN health sector leaders

leadership_coaching.description: Coach AMANA leaders and staff in leadership, strategic thinking, and stakeholder engagement

thought_leadership_contribution.description: Actively contribute to AMANA's thought leadership through writing, speakership, and strategic meetings

skin_in_the_game.advisory_role: Model commitment through active engagement and honest feedback to AMANA leadership
skin_in_the_game.implementation: Demonstrate ownership of advisory role through thorough preparation, independent judgment, and willingness to challenge constructively

excellence.value_description: Promote high professional and intellectual standards
excellence.advisory_role: Bring evidence-based insights and rigorous analysis to all advisory work
excellence.implementation: Apply 30+ years of expertise, continuous learning, and academic rigor (APA 7th citations) to elevate AMANA's advisory quality

empathy.value_description: Ensure AMANA remains grounded in human impact
empathy.advisory_role: Keep focus on public goods beneficiaries and end-users in all recommendations
empathy.implementation: Consider the human impact of policy decisions, organizational changes, and strategic initiatives on stakeholders and communities served

diversity.value_description: Support openness of ideas, people, and perspectives
diversity.advisory_role: Bring inclusive ASEAN and multi-stakeholder viewpoints to advisory discussions
diversity.implementation: Incorporate diverse perspectives from across ASEAN region, various health sector stakeholders, and different organizational levels in analysis and recommendations

market_positioning.unique_value_proposition: Combination of health policy expertise, ASEAN networks, leadership coaching capability, and thought leadership track record uniquely positions Dr. Ahmad to elevate AMANA's health sector advisory impact and institutional legitimacy
competitive_advantages: SATUSEHAT TWG Chair provides national digital health governance credibility and technical expertise
30+ years Indonesian health sector experience with policy and practice integration across emergency medicine, clinical research, and digital health
ASEAN health sector network for partnership bridging and regional collaboration
Proven thought leadership through publications, speaking, and advisory roles
Bilingual capability (English/Indonesian) for international-local bridge-building in ASEAN context
Clinical background (emergency medicine physician) with governance expertise provides practical implementation wisdom
brand_attributes: Strategic yet pragmatic - advisory grounded in real-world implementation
Evidence-based with implementation focus - rigorous analysis applied to practical challenges
Collaborative and bridge-building - connects stakeholders across boundaries
Authoritative yet accessible - deep expertise communicated approachably
Public goods mission-driven - committed to social impact and service delivery improvement

advisory_service_portfolio.description: Four formal advisory sessions per year with AMANA management and board
deliverables: Strategic guidance on health sector direction and positioning
Independent judgment on key decisions and initiatives
Idea sounding board and testing for new approaches
Ethical and governance oversight aligned with SEED values

advisory_service_portfolio.description: Responsive advisory on strategic health sector matters as they arise
deliverables: Policy analysis and recommendations on emerging issues

advisory_service_portfolio.description: Coaching AMANA team in leadership, strategic thinking, and stakeholder engagement
deliverables: Leadership development frameworks and materials tailored to AMANA context
Strategic thinking training sessions with practical tools
Stakeholder engagement skill-building for client interactions
Personal coaching and mentorship for emerging leaders

advisory_service_portfolio.description: Writing, speaking, and high-level meeting participation to elevate AMANA's profile
deliverables: Thought leadership articles and publications on health sector topics
Speaking engagements at health sector events and conferences
High-level strategic meeting representation on behalf of AMANA
AMANA reputation enhancement through association and endorsement
advisory_service_portfolio.time_commitment: Continuous (aligned with opportunities and AMANA needs)

institution_introductions.scope: Relevant institutions, policymakers, thought leaders in health sector
focus_areas: Public health institutions and research centers
Health innovation ecosystems and digital health communities

activities: Support AMANA's credibility in national and international circles through association
Strengthen institutional legitimacy through advisory governance and expertise
Enhance reputation through thought leadership content and speaking engagements
Provide intellectual validation of AMANA's approaches and methodologies

exclusions.no_fiduciary_authority: Does not have legal or financial responsibility - advisory role only
exclusions.no_operational_authority: Does not manage staff or approve budgets/contracts
exclusions.no_revenue_targets: No sales, revenue, or impact KPI responsibilities - not a commercial role
exclusions.advisory_only: Role is strictly advisory and stewardship-based, not operational or executive

compensation_structure.base_compensation: Coverage of technology tools and transportation costs for meetings
compensation_structure.performance_incentive: Percentage of project value for commercial projects acquired due to direct involvement (after discussion with Management)
compensation_structure.relationship_basis: Primarily intellectual partnership, institutional trust, and long-term mission alignment rather than transactional compensation

confidentiality_and_independence.confidentiality: Treat all AMANA information as confidential - advisory role requires discretion
confidentiality_and_independence.independence: Provide independent, honest, and objective advice even when challenging
confidentiality_and_independence.conflict_avoidance: Avoid conflicts of interest that may compromise impartiality; discuss with Management if in doubt

communication_profile.expertise_projection: Evidence-based advisor with governance wisdom and strategic insight

geographic_scope.primary_focus: Indonesia (AMANA's core market and primary operations)
geographic_scope.secondary_focus: ASEAN region (strategic partnership and bridging activities)
geographic_scope.international_context: Global public goods and health sector best practices for comparative learning
